title: Splitted Multiplayer
description: A modpack that allows for splitscreen multiplayer on PC. Req any launchers that uses the Modrinth API. Thanks for 3,500 downloads!
body:
### Good News- 6/26
So I got my pc back so there will be new updates to the modpack.

### Description
you ever wanted to chill on the couch playing minecraft with your buds but don't have a console? welp now u can do that. quick tutorial below:
### Requirements -
Friends (very difficult)

MultiMC (optional)

1 Minecraft Account

1 Controller or more

This ModPack
### Step-by-step

this tutorial uses MultiMC but you can use any launcher that has Modrinth API and can run multiple instances at the same time (like Modrinth App or PrismLauncher)
Launch MultiMC and click on "Add Instance"

![funny button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e909b62061d200f276d9f38ccd0697038e6e69ac.png)

Select "Import from zip" and select the file (or select modrinth and look for the modpack)

![import the flipping file](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee8cfb5b43c0810fc4dcc9de9a187af9325e85ae.png)

Duplicate the instance for each player

![disclaimer: player 2 MUST have the worst controller](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/adab0171c677eb0879e3e0dbe4aa99e1b4628de1.png)

Launch both the instances offline and choose a name

![player 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ec9f28032b2c66921cc64e6aa9ddb7657981772.png)
![player 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52942b4f31ee7b1b70551e1800824c214292f4b0.png)

Download Controllify's libraries

![i'm running out of jokes so i'm just gonna say potato](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/866c1897c090643399ea427bb0bb30922a90a7ed_0.webp)

Press F11 on both windows to turn on splitscreen

![there's a reason it's called "SPLITTED" Multiplayer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/103f9ad6f4be4c2081887a571ee779bba50a485f.png)

Make sure each account is using different controllers

![idk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4d94b969ed390fdeb60aeaf486846b1b53e04c3_0.webp)

Select global settings

![smiley team is kewl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3c23a28a49227c5993a77293573928e4c51bb51_0.webp)

Turn on "Out Of Focus Input" on each controller

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a0045d1203bc768765f76e9d3ace399a7ec0466.png)

Create a world in one account and open it to LAN

![house](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85d51059362af35eb14a12b632dfd684211f7ef0_0.webp)

Tell the other players to join the world and you should be all good to go

![yayy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15bc930ff35ad028bcec8f97eb7eb12c37b89cca.png)

### FAQ

Q: "Why is my skin not showing up on other people's screen?"
A: Select another skin THEN select the one you want. if it still doesn't work try rejoining the world

Q: "Is this compatible with ______?"

A: I have no idea. i've only tested the modpack with sodium and nothing else. Essential might not work because you have to launch offline aka. without a Microsoft Account

Q: "How do i use this modpack/How do i make it work?"

A: There's a step-by-step tutorial on the description.

Q: "Can i use this logged in on a Microsoft Account?"

A: No. When you try to join the world it's gonna say the name's already taken

Q: "Can i use this on a pirated version?"

A: No. Minecraft's $25. You can pay for that.

Q: "Are you a potato?"

A: What?

Q: "Who would win, 100 Men or 1 Gorilla?"

A: can you like.. ask questions about the modpack? also 100 men win

Q: "Can my friend use a VPN play from his house?"

A: I don't know why'd you download the modpack if you wanna do that but sure. I don't know how to do that tho. dm jorden (@jordensmiley) for that

Q: "How many players can play at the same time?"

A: SplitScreen supports only up to 4 players but you can just mess around with the windows yourself

Q: "I don't have a controller! what should i do??"

A: Download "Monect" on your PC and phone and download a controller layout on the forums. I'm not showing you how to do that so go watch a random tutorial from some indian guy.
